name: Kielbasa and Bow Tie Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Smoked kielbasa, cut into 1/4" pieces
15 oz Canned pasta-ready tomatoes - with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage until lightly browned.
2. Add the broth and tomatoes; cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Uncover, add the bow tie pasta, and cook until al dente, about 8-9 minutes.
4. Spoon the soup into bowls and sprinkle with parsley.
